scope_note: Cert [483]: QA Witt Tower Crypto Momentum Asymmetry. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) doi:10.2307/2325486 (EMH baseline); Jegadeesh N & Titman S (1993) doi:10.1111/j.1540-6261.1993.tb04702.x (momentum baseline). Data: Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV (BTC-USD 2015-01-01, ETH-USD 2017-11-09). Return-rank a=b+2e>=58 (Cosmos-type pairs: consecutive high-return days); target=rets[t+2] (no look-ahead). BTC: n=654 excess=+0.254% perm_p=0.025 OOS_n=326 mean_oos=+0.214%. ETH: n=479 excess=+0.157% perm_p=0.209 (NULL). Asymmetry: crash-reversion (a<=6, cert[482]) is 3.34x BTC momentum and 11.3x ETH momentum. orbit_family on (b,e,m=27): Cosmos-type pairs (a>=58) show weaker continuation vs Singularity-type pairs (a<=6) mean-reversion. MOD=27. Parents: cert [482] (crash-reversion), cert [110] (Witt Tower).
